
### missing pieces 


* [multi-cycle memories]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only}
* beyond pipelining: out-of-order, multiple issue


### againframe(missingPieces)

### multi-cycle memories  {.smaller}


* ideal case for memories: single-cycle
* achieved with <em>caches</em> (next topic) 

   * fast access to small number of things
 
<hr class="vspace" />
* typical performance: 

   * 90+% of the time: single-cycle

* sometimes many cycles (3--400+)


### variable speed memories 

![](/ooo/texfig/varSpeedMem.figure.svg)


### againframe(missingPieces)

{{< include /pipe/_missingPiecesMI.qmd >}}

{{< include /pipe/_missingPiecesOOO.qmd >}}
